violations.description: Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. - Damaged drink cans were sitting in handwashing sink during inspection. Items cannot be stored in the handwashing sink.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Sandwiches and subs made at second location was not dated or labeled before displaying for sale.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Small fridge behind counter in need of cleaning. - Air fryer in need of cleaning. Thick layer of cooked on food debris visible.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with waste receptacle as needed. - No waste receptacle provided in back room where handwashing sink is located.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
